lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on either the interior or exterior. The car has been meticulously maintained and is in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and visible surface wear. The interior shows moderate use with noticeable wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functioning.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and usage. Mechanically, the engine is dependable and starts without issue, but you should expect some minor oil seeps and the eventual need for suspension work as is typical for its mileage. The exterior paint has several noticeable scratches and some fading on the roof, while the interior shows significant wear on the driver's seat and carpet. It is a solid choice for someone needing a functional car who doesn't mind cosmetic imperfections.

Looking for a project or a super affordable way to get from A to B? This car is a real diamond in the rough! While it definitely needs some TLC and has significant wear from its years on the road, it offers a fantastic opportunity for a mechanic or someone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper. Grab this bargain and give it the new life it deserves!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows its age in several areas. The exterior has some noticeable clear coat peeling on the roof and a few scuffs on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear on the driver's side bolster, and the air conditioning takes a few minutes to get cold. Mechanically, the car starts every time and shifts smoothly, but the tires will likely need replacement within the next 5,000 miles and there is a small oil seep near the valve cover. It is a solid, functional vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This premium pre-owned vehicle exemplifies a sophisticated balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly inspected, it offers dependable performance and a refined interior environment. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an authoritative driving experience and sustained reliability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s looking for a new home. It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape! It’s super clean, drives smoothly, and is ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to love how comfortable it is—come take a look and see for yourself!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, optimized by individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable engine. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive shape both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic wear consistent with light, careful use. Inside, the leather upholstery is supple and clean, while all electronic features—including the navigation system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is solid; it has a documented service history, shifts smoothly, and the engine runs quietly. It offers a refined driving experience and has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment. This is a reliable, well-presented example ready for immediate enjoyment.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and aesthetic integrity. This automobile has been preserved to a high standard, exhibiting a refined interior and a robust mechanical profile that ensures a confident driving experience. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, executive-grade transport. A distinguished selection for those who value quality and long-term value.

We are pleased to offer this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies sustained mechanical integrity and sophisticated presentation. Having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile delivers a superior driving experience and represents a distinguished acquisition for those prioritizing both reliability and value. It remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent care and consistent servicing.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it's honestly in such great shape! It’s been super well-maintained, runs like a dream, and is ready to hit the road with its next owner today. It’s got plenty of life left in it and is just looking for a new home where it’ll be appreciated. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW's high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS, providing linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. It is paired with the desirable 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with proactive rear subframe reinforcement and fresh bushings to maintain structural rigidity under high lateral loads. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and a cooling system refresh. While the finish shows minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with regular use, the drivetrain is optimized for performance, featuring a responsive throttle and a balanced MacPherson/multi-link suspension setup that tracks true through the apex.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and free of major curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the leather upholstery is supple and well-preserved, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have significant tread remaining, ensuring a confident grip on the road. Whether you're commuting or taking a weekend getaway, this car offers a refined driving experience that belies its mileage. It is a solid, dependable choice for a discerning buyer looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership’s rigorous standards. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. Offering a sophisticated synthesis of reliability and value, it stands as a testament to diligent previous ownership. We invite serious inquiries to experience this vehicle’s refined road presence and proven durability.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really nice shape, super reliable, and has plenty of life left for its next owner! Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go. Come check it out—you won't be disappointed!
This 987.2 Cayman S features the coveted 3.4L DFI flat-six, delivering linear power delivery
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring supple upholstery with minimal wear and a full suite of functional electronics, including a premium audio system and crisp climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced regularly, with recent maintenance records available to prove its mechanical health. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the brakes are responsive, ensuring a confident and comfortable driving experience. This is a dependable, high-quality car that has been treated with genuine care throughout its life.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and performance. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and comfort. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this specimen offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. It stands as a premier selection for the discerning professional seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and value. This vehicle remains in superior operational order, reflecting a history of diligent care and consistent servicing.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next big adventure? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in great shape, runs super smoothly, and has been really well-loved. Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this beauty is ready to go. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain is reinforced with a recent Vanos overhaul and rod bearing service for mechanical longevity. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows honest wear consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, while the suspension retains its signature damping profile. A mechanically sorted example ready for the apex.
Clean title. Reliable engine. Minor exterior wear. Interior well-maintained. Service records included.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, though you may find the occasional minor stone chip or light surface mark indicative of careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, and every button and dial operates exactly as it should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers consistent power, backed by a comprehensive service history that includes recent fluid changes and a fresh set of brake pads. This car has never missed a beat and is ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service. It is a clean, honest example of a well-loved machine that still looks sharp in any driveway.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking reliability and executive presence without compromise.
